results.natural_language: Rank the top 3 selling genres in each country by number of tracks sold
results.ground_truth_sql: SELECT country, genre, tracks_sold, genre_rank FROM (SELECT i.BillingCountry AS country, g.Name AS genre, COUNT(il.InvoiceLineId) AS tracks_sold, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY i.BillingCountry ORDER BY COUNT(il.InvoiceLineId) DESC) AS genre_rank FROM Invoice i JOIN InvoiceLine il ON i.InvoiceId = il.InvoiceId JOIN Track t ON il.TrackId = t.TrackId JOIN Genre g ON t.GenreId = g.GenreId GROUP BY i.BillingCountry, g.GenreId, g.Name) WHERE genre_rank <= 3 ORDER BY country, genre_rank;
results.predicted_sql:
-- Ranking top 3 selling genres per country by tracks sold using a CTE with ROW_NUMBER()
WITH genre_sales AS (
    SELECT
        i.BillingCountry AS country,
        g.Name AS genre,
        SUM(il.Quantity) AS tracks_sold
    FROM InvoiceLine il
    JOIN Invoice i ON il.InvoiceId = i.InvoiceId
    JOIN Track t ON il.TrackId = t.TrackId
    JOIN Genre g ON t.GenreId = g.GenreId
    GROUP BY i.BillingCountry, g.GenreId, g.Name
),
ranked AS (
    SELECT
        country,
        genre,
        tracks_sold,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY country ORDER BY tracks_sold DESC) AS rank
    FROM genre_sales
)
SELECT
    country,
    rank,
    genre,
    tracks_sold
FROM ranked
WHERE rank <= 3
ORDER BY country, rank
